Welcome to Profitfxt Limited

Trade and invest in top stocks and ETFs. Trade currency pairs, Cryptocurrencies, Indices and Commodities via CFDs. Investing in the financial markets has never been easier.

Login Signup

Open An Account

It is easy and free. Fill the “Registration” form and you’re good to go.

Fund Your Account

Fund your Investment through any of the available Payment gateways.

Trade

Activate your account and get access plans to start making trading seamlessly .

Withdraw Profit

Swift withdrawal of your profit after successful trades.

About

Find Out More About Us

The company Profitfxt Limited was incorporated in 2018 under the companies 2006 as a private company, that the company is limited by shares.

Updated 2020

Profitfxt Limited is founded with vision to create 100 percent transparent digital trading experience for its clients. We always had the idea that the investment industry was missing more broad-minded business values. Profitfxt Limited has a very forward-thinking approach and has always adopted a very flexible business philosophy which has helped us tap into different sectors of the investment sector with great success. Our company is interested in successful and prosperous traders who will create high trading volume. We are proud that we helped many customers to make revenue.

  • Goal

    Since the founding of Profitfxt Limited, our principles have been absolute transparency, dedication to our clients, as well as a complete understanding of the features of our profile market and the expectations of different types of investors.

Countries Supported

Why Us

Check our Services

Building trust is important and to ensure you know you are protected, Profitfxt Limited has employed regulation and state-of-the-art technology for you to trade with confidence.

Regulation

As a regulated broker we must maintain high levels of capitalization, transparency and reporting. Our clients’ funds are segregated from our own in Tier 1 banks.

High Level Security

We use DDOS attack prevention, and Secure Socket Layer encryption in order to protect our assets and our client data.

We Are Global

Our services are provided in over 100 countries worldwide.

Multi Asset

Invest In Stocks, Commodities and Forex with endless trading opportunities.

Privacy

We don't require identity verification. Information about your activity on the website is private and can't be accessed by third parties.

Support

Our Support team works tirelessly all day and night to make sure you suffer no inconvenience.

Supported Platforms

For all Devices

Our services has been tailor made for all devices and individuals

Mobile Web App

Trade and Invest anytime and anywhere using Our mobile web application, designed to support your trading needs. You can access charts and your account, offers all traders the opportunity to trade a wide range of the top ranked digital coins.

Web Trader Platform

Open your browser and trade on the go. You can access your account and trade as usual without downloading or installing any software. We guarantee that trading using the web platform is safe, with your information securely encrypted. You can place any type of orders, trade currencies, CFDs and other products, making use of accurate technical indicators.

MT4 Platform

Use the most powerful, easy-to-use platform when trading forex. MetaTrader 4 enables you to track few charts simultaneously, trade directly from the chart, place orders, and manage multiple orders. The software is free and easy to install.

F.A.Q

Frequently Asked Questions

A collection of the most popular questions asked by our users

  • What is Profitfxt Limited?

    Profitfxt Limited is a Binary and Forex trading and Investment platform. The platform is designed to make trading and Investment a pleasant and profitable experience for you, regardless of your level of training.

  • How do I become a Member?

    This can be done quickly and easily. Click the Registration button and fill out a simple form, after which a welcome email will be sent to your e-mail address. Using the registration data, log in to your Member's Area, where you can carry out all activities related to management of your account.

  • Do I need to deposit right away?

    Yes you need to make a deposit before trading or Investing. We do not offer a demo account for traders.

  • Do I need to download any software to trade?

    Trading and Investment is carried out on the web-platform. The downloading of additional software is not necessary. We recommend trading and Investment on the most current version of your browser.

  • At what age is trading permitted?

    You must be 18 years old or older to sign up and trade or Invest on the platform.

  • Can bots or automated trading processes be used?

    Bots and Automatic trading on this website is prohibited. Any User that attempts to use any such means would be fined

  • Which currency can be used for trading?

    We only offer Bitcoin and USD for trading.

  • How can I delete my account on the website?

    To delete an account, you need to send an email with the subject "Block account" to info@profitfxt.com from the email address with which you signed up for the account, or you can fill out a ticket request using our contact form found on the homepage of this website. After which we would verify if the account belongs to you.

  • I have a question that is not here?

    You can use the contact form on the homepage of this website to send us a message. Or email us directly at info@profitfxt.com

  • How can I deposit funds into my trading account?

    Funding your account is easy and secure. You can fund your account by Bitcoin, Western union, Skrill, USD.

  • How quickly will funds be added to my account?

    The funds will be available for trading immediately, once we receive a confirmation from payment system.

  • Can I see the history of all my transactions?

    Information on all your transactions is located on your Account page/Dashboard.

  • How can I deposit funds into my trading account?

    Funding your account is easy and secure. You can fund your account by Bitcoin, Western union, Skrill, USD.

  • What is the minimum and maximum deposit amount?

    The minimum deposit amount is $50 for Bitcoin and PerfectMoney, and $5000 for other payment methods. The maximum deposit amount is $1,000,000.

  • Does Profitfxt Limited accept cash deposits?

    Profitfxt Limited yes, through any of our agent .

  • Which currencies can I deposit?

    Profitfxt Limited accepts and converts all currencies to USD

  • What are the conditions for withdrawal?

    After making a withdrawal request you will be contacted on steps to follow accordingly.

  • What methods are there for withdrawal?

    All withdrawals can be processed with any of the available deposit methods.

  • How fast will I receive my funds?

    Withdrawal will be processed as soon as all documents required for withdrawal have been verified by Profitfxt Limited. Profitfxt Limited will notify you via email as soon as funds have been processed. It is then left for you to wait to receive the funds by the payment method you selected earlier.

  • What are the withdrawal charges

    Withdrawal charges will be made known to clients via email.

  • What is the minimum and maximum withdrawal amount?

    The minimum withdrawal amount $1000.

  • Do I need to provide any documents for withdrawal?

    The security team has the right to request a scanned image or digital photo of the first page of a valid ID card, as well as additional documentation (a photo of a credit card, a photo of you holding your passport open at the photo page, a screenshot of your electronic wallet) to make sure that the account details and documentation belong to the person requesting the withdrawal.

  • Can I withdraw from my account money that I deposited before trading?

    Yes, this is possible. However, you will be charged a small fee.
